title: [DO NOT MERGE] c/image commit 0cc0e9 + openssl support
body:
go mod edit -replace github.com/containers/image=github.com/lsm5/containers-image@openssl-testing
make vendor

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

comments.body: https://github.com/lsm5/containers-image/commits/openssl-testing is the c/image replacement used here.
timed out on the last few tests, looking into it...
See https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/727 which vendors c/image master branch. Those are similar to what I observed when vendoring in c/image master branch + c/libtrust patch.
No idea what's going on. It seems related to go mod changing the dependencies which is not (yet) covered in the c/image CI as it's not using `go mod` for testing the branch/PR.

@mtrmac so, it seems that any c/image commit with go mod in it fails skopeo CI. As per @vrothberg's suggestion, vendoring `335b34f9ac7d` failed the same way as master, while `713c8d43f997` worked fine  (for linux atleast, not for darwin)
Trying to get it back into a working state here: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/708
@lsm5 Assuming this is no longer necessary, please reopen if that’s not the case.
